text: Financial Crime moves faster than anyone wants to admit.
But compliance. Compliance moves like this.
Humans can do compliance, case by case, click by click.
But what if you could hire a single analyst with infinite time?
While one analyst can review one case at a time, Sphinx reviews hundreds of them in parallel.
We don't just automate tasks, we run the investigation.
Document analysis, source verification, patent detection, deep research.
Speed isn't working faster. It's removing the weights.
Decisions happen when the evidence is ready.
Not when someone finally gets their case.
We raise $7 million to build your last compliance hire.
And give every financial institution a way to move faster than risk.
